subtitle.ja: 両手の小指に糸をかけて始めます。両手の親指を小指の輪に下から入れ、小指向こう側の糸を上から取り、手のひらを上に向けます
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on both little fingers. Insert both thumbs from below into the little-finger loops, move over and pick down the far little-finger strings, and turn the palms upward.

subtitle.ja: 左右の手のひらの糸を5本の指で取り合います。取った糸は手首に落ちます
subtitle.en: With all five fingers, pick up the palm strings from each other’s hands; the taken strings fall away naturally to the wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指手前側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、親指向こう側の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, pick up from below the far thumb strings.

subtitle.ja: 右親指手前の下の糸を左手で持ち、親指に1回巻き付けます
subtitle.en: Take the near lower right-thumb string with the left hand and wrap it once around the right thumb.

subtitle.ja: 右小指向こう側の下の糸を左手で持ち、小指に1回巻き付けます
subtitle.en: Take the far lower right–little-finger string with the left hand and wrap it once around the right little finger.

subtitle.ja: 同様に、左親指と小指に糸を巻き付けます
subtitle.en: In the same way, wrap the strings once around the left thumb and left little finger.

subtitle.ja: 左親指から小指にかかっている2本の糸を、右手で持って外します
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the two strings running from the left thumb to the left little finger and remove them.

subtitle.ja: 右親指から小指にかかっている2本の糸を、左手で持って外します
subtitle.en: With the left hand, take the two strings running from the right thumb to the right little finger and remove them.

subtitle.ja: 左手首の糸を右手で持ち、左人差し指中指小指にかけ直します。両手を広げて完成です
subtitle.en: Take the left-wrist string with the right hand and place it onto the left index, middle, and little fingers; open the hands to show the finished figure.
